Package global.thalion.ttio.codecs

Class RefDiffV2

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.codecs.RefDiffV2
public final class RefDiffV2 extends Object
REF_DIFF v2 — CRAM-style bit-packed sequence diff codec (codec id 14).

Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-03-ref-diff-v2-design.md

High-level API; delegates to TtioRansNative.encodeRefDiffV2(byte[], long[], long[], java.lang.String[], byte[], byte[], java.lang.String, int) / TtioRansNative.decodeRefDiffV2(byte[], long[], java.lang.String[], byte[], int, long) which call the C library entries ttio_ref_diff_v2_encode/decode.

    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    RefDiffV2.BlobHeader
    Minimal header extracted from a refdiff_v2 blob.
    static final class 
    RefDiffV2.Pair
    Decoded result pair: concatenated sequences and offset table.

  • Method Details

    • isAvailable

      public static boolean isAvailable()
      Returns:
      true iff the native JNI library loaded successfully.

    • parseBlobHeader

      public static RefDiffV2.BlobHeader parseBlobHeader(byte[] blob)
      Parse referenceMd5 and referenceUri from the outer header of a refdiff_v2 blob.

      The outer header layout mirrors REF_DIFF v1 but uses magic "RDF2": 

         [0:4]        magic "RDF2"
   [4]          version (uint8)
   [5:8]        reserved
   [8:12]       num_slices (uint32 LE)
   [12:20]      total_reads (uint64 LE)
   [20:36]      reference_md5 (16 raw bytes)
   [36:38]      uri_len (uint16 LE)
   [38:38+len]  reference_uri (UTF-8)
      Parameters:
      blob - encoded blob produced by encode(byte[], long[], long[], java.lang.String[], byte[], byte[], java.lang.String, int)
      Returns:
      parsed RefDiffV2.BlobHeader
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - on bad magic or truncated header

    • encode

      public static byte[] encode(byte[] sequences, long[] offsets, long[] positions, String[] cigarStrings, byte[] reference, byte[] referenceMd5, String referenceUri, int readsPerSlice)
      Encode a slice of reads to the refdiff_v2 blob.
      Parameters:
      sequences - concatenated read bases (ACGTN ASCII)
      offsets - n_reads + 1 entries, per-read start in sequences[]
      positions - per-read 1-based reference position
      cigarStrings - per-read CIGAR
      reference - reference chromosome bytes
      referenceMd5 - 16-byte MD5 of the reference
      referenceUri - UTF-8 reference URI
      readsPerSlice - typically 10000
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if input constraints are violated
      RuntimeException - on native error

    • decode

      public static RefDiffV2.Pair decode(byte[] encoded, long[] positions, String[] cigarStrings, byte[] reference, int nReads, long totalBases)
      Decode a refdiff_v2 blob to (sequences, offsets).
      Parameters:
      encoded - blob produced by encode(byte[], long[], long[], java.lang.String[], byte[], byte[], java.lang.String, int)
      positions - per-read 1-based reference position (same as encode)
      cigarStrings - per-read CIGAR (same as encode)
      reference - reference chromosome bytes
      nReads - number of reads
      totalBases - total number of bases across all reads
      Returns:
      RefDiffV2.Pair containing decoded sequences and offsets arrays
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if input constraints are violated
      RuntimeException - on native error
